narrative: PRL gave back most of last week's rally: volume-weighted price settled at $0.9181 (-37.94% 24h) across seven Ethereum pairs, with cross-venue volume cooling to $280.7k (about half of yesterday's $572.6k) as the air came out of the move. Underneath the drawdown the fundamentals kept compounding — bridge custody grew another +9.6% to 396,491 PRL, minted WPRL climbed +10.1% to 388,823, and surplus tightened to a clean 1.97%, so flows are still net-inbound even as the spot price corrects. Network hashrate broke a new high at 27.55 EH/s (+21% in 24h) with block times steady near 114s; MinePRL's pool share has now compressed to ~0.048% as larger off-pool capacity continues to come online. Code velocity stayed strong (public-frontend 70 commits/7d on next-branch UI work, PearlWallet 10/7d on docs and audit attributions, L1 core picked up a getblocktemplate IBD fix and +17 stars to 139).

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: dexscreener:tokens/0x07696DcaB55E62cfef953666b29Fe1970518cB00 (7 Ethereum pairs aggregated, volume-weighted price and 24h change)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: PRL price -37.94% in 24h ($1.4477 → $0.9181) on cooling volume ($572.6k → $280.7k). Drawdown looks like profit-taking after the four-day rally, not a bridge or infrastructure event — custody and mint flows kept growing through it.
Bridge custody +9.6% to 396,491 PRL and minted WPRL +10.1% to 388,823 — net inflow continued despite the spot drawdown; surplus tightened to a healthy 1.97%.
Network hashrate +21% to 27.55 EH/s while MinePRL pool active GPUs eased 67 → 58 and pool share compressed to 0.048%; off-pool capacity continues to dominate.

social.summary: X API not exercised this run. After a parabolic stretch the spot price corrected ~38% while bridge custody and hashrate kept making new highs — sentiment read deferred until a sampled-tweets pass.

github.last_commit_msg: fix(rpc): use chain.IsCurrent for getblocktemplate IBD check (#125)
ui(next): extend resume countdown +3h, unify deposits + free withdrawals
docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
